name: Linux Gold Corp.
summary: Linux Gold Corp. acquires, explores, and develops mineral properties in the United States. The company primarily explores for gold and platinum ores. It holds interests in the Dime Creek property comprising 12 mining claims, located near Nome; and the Livengood property consisting of 13 mining claims, located in the Livengood-Tolovana mining district, Alaska. The company was formerly known as LinuxWizardry Systems, Inc. and changed its name to Linux Gold Corp. in March 2003. Linux Gold Corp. was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Richmond, Canada.
